creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221817
Patch

- Update MASTER_SITES to https
- Switch to options helpers, CMAKE_BOOL, PORTEXAMPLES
- Install examples into designated EXAMPLESDIR, instead of bin/
- Fix inability to build python support along with docs (you don't need to enable DOCUMENTATION cmake option - as it enables doxygen docs which are not installed anyway)
